countries.name: China
countries.notes: 20% base (10% reciprocal + 10% fentanyl). Section 301 tariffs (7.5-25%) apply to many products.

countries.name: Mexico
countries.notes: 0% reciprocal rate. USMCA-compliant goods enter duty-free.

countries.name: Canada
countries.notes: 35% for non-USMCA goods. USMCA-compliant goods are duty-free (0%).
